betaBar: 🚧 Beta version — early access, all features free during the beta

hero.sub: One platform for digital menu, reservations, front desk, housekeeping, HR and analytics. No more juggling ten systems.
hero.demoErr: The demo is currently unavailable. Please try again later.

showcase.title: Live demo — see it from the guest and staff side
showcase.sub: A real demo venue, every page live. Open any of them, no signup.
showcase.liveNote: Everything is live from the demo venue; changes reset automatically every night.
showcase.adminTitle: Step into the real admin panel
showcase.adminSub: The whole dashboard as if it were your business — explore the modules, change data, you cannot break anything.
showcase.adminF3: Front desk, rooms, folio and billing
showcase.publicLabel: Public surfaces — what your guests see

rest.sub: Digital QR menu, table map, waiter requests, kitchen dashboard and analytics in one package. Works as a standalone restaurant system or integrated with the hotel folio.

hot.sub: Front desk, reservations, housekeeping, revenue management and Spa & Wellness. An online booking engine directly from your hotel page — no commissions.

addons.label: Operational add-ons
addons.title: Shared services for both verticals
addons.sub: HR, inventory and analytics work equally for restaurant and hotel staff. Activate only what you need.

beta.label: Beta program
beta.subPre: rest.by.me is in active development. Early users get
beta.subStrong: full access to all modules for free
beta.subPost: during the beta — with direct support and the chance to influence development. Access is approved manually so we can help each venue with setup.
beta.notePre: Pricing and subscription plans will be announced after the beta ends. Early users keep special treatment. Questions?

cta.label: Join the beta
cta.sub: Choose what you run and request access — we usually respond with approval within one business day.
cta.note: Free during the beta · Access on approval · Direct support

1.d: A modern menu accessible by scanning. No app, works instantly on any phone.

2.d: The guest taps a button — the waiter gets a notification on their device.

3.d: A visual table map with real-time statuses for the whole restaurant.

4.d: The kitchen tracks orders live, by priority and status.

5.d: Which items get viewed most, when the peaks are, which languages dominate.

6.d: Montenegrin + English in the base package. Tourists manage on their own.

1.d: Check-in, check-out, room status and reservations on one screen.

2.d: Booking engine with an occupancy calendar and a per-guest folio system.

3.d: Tasks for staff, cleaning status, priorities — all in real time.

4.d: Dynamic pricing, RevPAR, yield management and occupancy analytics.

5.d: Treatment booking, therapist calendar, capacities and folio integration.

6.d: A mobile app for guests — orders, booking, hotel info.

1.d: Scheduling, attendance, payroll for all staff.

3.d: Advanced reports, PDF/Excel export, custom periods.

4.d: Sync with Booking.com, Airbnb, Expedia — coming soon.

5.d: Points, tier system, redemption for guests — coming soon.

6.d: Manage multiple properties with one account — coming soon.

1.d: Digital menu, table map, waiter requests, kitchen dashboard, analytics.

2.d: Front desk, reservations, folio, housekeeping, revenue management, night audit.

3.d: Treatment booking, therapist calendar, reviews and folio integration.

4.d: Guests book and order directly — no commissions to intermediaries.

5.d: Scheduling, attendance, payroll, stock and recipes for staff of both verticals.

6.d: Early users get personal support and influence the platform’s development.
